MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/26/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Denise K. Top, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

No other appearance, Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to compel production of documents #19 is Granted. Plaintiff shall produce copies of records from domestic or India-based cell phone providers for the periods 5/7/07 to 6/12/07 and 8/30/07 to 10/15/07.
Plaintiff may redact phone numbers of any individuals or businesses not related to Wells fargo Bank. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Continued To Nov-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Denise K. Top, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Wells Fargo Bank, N. A.
Michael Welch, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Praveen Galav

After hearing, Defendant Wells Fargo Bank's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is continued to November 6, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 610, for further hearing. If no appearances, motion will be taken off calendar. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
